languages.text: {n}Себериан медленно кивает, не отводя взгляда.{/n} "Благодарю за фору. Когда мы вернемся обратно в известную часть Простора Коронус — обязательно воспользуюсь ей".
{n}Seberian nods slowly, not averting his gaze.{/n} "I thank you for the head start. When we return to the known reaches of the Koronus Expanse, I shall most certainly take advantage of it."
languages.original_text: {n}Себериан медленно кивает, не отводя взгляда.{/n} "Благодарю за фору. Когда мы вернемся обратно в известную часть Простора Коронус — обязательно воспользуюсь ей".

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安缓缓点头，并未移开目光。{/n}“谢谢。等我们回到科罗努斯扩区已知星域，我定会好好利用这一优势。”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian nods slowly, not averting his gaze.{/n} "I thank you for the head start. When we return to the known reaches of the Koronus Expanse, I shall most certainly take advantage of it."

languages.text: {n}Seberian asiente sin apartar la mirada.{/n} «Agradezco la ventaja de salida. Cuando volvamos a la Extensión de Koronus, la aprovecharé, desde luego».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian nods slowly, not averting his gaze.{/n} "I thank you for the head start. When we return to the known reaches of the Koronus Expanse, I shall most certainly take advantage of it."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian asiente sin apartar la mirada.{/n} «Agradezco la ventaja de salida. Cuando volvamos a la Extensión de Koronus, la aprovecharé, desde luego».

languages.text: {n}Seberian hoche la tête lentement, sans détourner le regard.{/n} « Je vous remercie pour l'avance. Lorsque nous serons de retour dans les régions connues des Étendues de Koronus, j'en ferai bon usage. »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian nods slowly, not averting his gaze.{/n} "I thank you for the head start. When we return to the known reaches of the Koronus Expanse, I shall most certainly take advantage of it."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian hoche la tête lentement, sans détourner le regard.{/n} « Je vous remercie pour l'avance. Lorsque nous serons de retour dans les régions connues des Étendues de Koronus, j'en ferai bon usage. »

languages.text: {n}Seberian, bakışlarını kaçırmadan yavaşça başını sallıyor.{/n} "Avans için teşekkür ederim. Koronus Enginliği'nin bilinen bölgelerine döndüğümüzde bundan kesinlikle faydalanacağım."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian nods slowly, not averting his gaze.{/n} "I thank you for the head start. When we return to the known reaches of the Koronus Expanse, I shall most certainly take advantage of it."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian, bakışlarını kaçırmadan yavaşça başını sallıyor.{/n} "Avans için teşekkür ederim. Koronus Enginliği'nin bilinen bölgelerine döndüğümüzde bundan kesinlikle faydalanacağım."

languages.text: {n}Seberian nickt langsam, ohne den Blick abzuwenden.{/n} "Ich danke Euch für den Vorsprung. Wenn wir in die bekannten Gefilde der Koronus-Ausdehnung zurückkehren, werde ich gewiss davon Gebrauch machen."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian nods slowly, not averting his gaze.{/n} "I thank you for the head start. When we return to the known reaches of the Koronus Expanse, I shall most certainly take advantage of it."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian nickt langsam, ohne den Blick abzuwenden.{/n} "Ich danke Euch für den Vorsprung. Wenn wir in die bekannten Gefilde der Koronus-Ausdehnung zurückkehren, werde ich gewiss davon Gebrauch machen."

languages.text:
{n}セベリアンはゆっくりと頷き、目を逸らさない。{/n}
「先手を打っていただきありがとうございます。コルノス・エクスパンションの知られている範囲に戻った時には、必ずその恩恵を受けます。」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian nods slowly, not averting his gaze.{/n} "I thank you for the head start. When we return to the known reaches of the Koronus Expanse, I shall most certainly take advantage of it."
